title: Restful Uruguayan Morning Bowl
description: A soothing vegan breakfast bowl inspired by the calmness of Uruguay, featuring a restful blend of fruits, yogurt, and granola.

ingredients.name: Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Make sure to choose a vegan yogurt alternative.

instructions: In a bowl, mix together almond milk, chia seeds, and coconut sugar. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
In a pan, toast oats over medium heat for 2-3 minutes until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, mash banana using a fork until smooth.
In a separate bowl, mix together yogurt and sliced almonds.
To assemble the bowl, layer the toasted oats, banana mash, yogurt mixture, and granola.
Garnish with additional sliced almonds if desired.
